title: Datadog PHP Agent Installation & Setup

actors.name: DevOps Engineer
actors.description: Human operator running datadog-setup.php from CLI

actors.name: Packagist API
actors.description: https://repo.packagist.org/p2/%s.json — queried by PackageUpdater to find latest library versions

actors.name: WebServer / PHP-FPM
actors.description: Target runtime (Apache, nginx, php-fpm CLI). Must be restarted by DevOps after install; not automated by installer

use_cases.name: Install Datadog PHP Tracer
steps: ini_values(binary) — read PHP_API, EXTENSION_DIR, INI_SCANDIR, INI_MAIN, Thread Safety, Debug Build
download(RELEASE_URL_PREFIX + tar.gz, tmpDir) from GitHub Releases

use_cases.name: Uninstall Datadog PHP Tracer
steps: modify_ini_file() — comment out extension=ddtrace.so, datadog-profiling.so, ddappsec.so lines
unlink ddtrace.so, datadog-profiling.so, ddappsec.so from extension_dir
Report success/warnings (file preserved with custom settings intact)

use_cases.name: Configure INI Setting (set)
steps: update_ini_setting(setting, iniFile, promoteComment=false) per INI file
If not found in active settings, promote commented-out line or append new entry to 98-ddtrace.ini

use_cases.name: View INI Setting (get)
steps: IniRecord::println() — outputs 'setting = value; default: X, binary: Y, INI file: Z'

use_cases.name: List All Datadog INI Settings
steps: get_ini_settings(sourcesDir, appsecHelperPath, appsecRulesPath) — full Datadog INI schema
find_all_ini_files(phpProperties) — all .ini files in scan dir
parse_ini_file() — intersect with Datadog setting names
Populate IniRecord objects and println() each

use_cases.name: Update Integration Package Versions
steps: findTestFiles() — RecursiveDirectoryIterator on tests/Integrations/, filter *Test.php in 'Latest' dirs
processFile(file) — per test class: findLibrary() via getTestedLibrary() or composer.json require
findComposerFile() — walk up dir tree from getAppIndexScript()/getConsoleScript()
getLatestVersion(library) — curl Packagist API, filter stable versions, semver sort
updatePackageVersion() — write updated version to composer.json
displaySummary() — report updated packages or exit(1) on errors
use_cases.notes: Test utility only; not part of production installer flow

use_cases.name: Select PHP Binary Interactively
steps: search_php_binaries() — scans PATH + known paths (Remi Safe, Plesk, /usr/bin/php*)

use_cases.name: Restart Web Server
use_cases.notes: Not automated by installer. DevOps must manually restart Apache/nginx/php-fpm after install/uninstall for INI changes to take effect. SAPI types handled: cli, apache2, fpm.

key_classes.name: IniRecord
methods: println(): void — formats 'setting = value; default: X, binary: Y, INI file: Z'
key_classes.role: Data transfer object for a single Datadog INI setting read from an INI file

key_classes.name: PackageUpdater
methods: findTestFiles(): array — finds *Test.php in Latest/* dirs
key_classes.role: Dev tool to auto-update integration test composer.json to latest stable library versions

important_notes: Installer is a single-file PHP script (datadog-setup.php); no OOP except IniRecord
Supports interactive mode (no --php-bin flag) and non-interactive mode (--php-bin all|<path>)
Platform detection: linux-gnu, linux-musl (Alpine), windows; architecture via get_architecture()
Extension variants: plain / -debug / -zts (thread-safe) based on PHP build
INI file precedence: 98-ddtrace.ini in scan dir takes priority; falls back to php.ini
Debian-based SAPI split: cli/conf.d, apache2/conf.d, fpm/conf.d all updated
AppSec: installs ddappsec.so + libddappsec-helper.so + etc/recommended.json rules
Upgrade path: replaces legacy 'extension=/opt/datadog-php/xyz.so' with bare 'extension=ddtrace.so'
PackageUpdater is a separate dev/test utility, not invoked by the installer wizard
Web server restart is a manual post-install step not encoded in the script
